title: 25 questions
subtitle: Answer for how you usually are, not how you wish you were.

items.text: I like thinking about ideas that are a little unusual.
I enjoy learning things outside my everyday routine.
I prefer sticking to what I know over trying something new.
I often imagine different ways a situation could go.
I notice small details in music, art, or writing.
I usually finish what I start.
My space or schedule is often messy.
I keep going on boring tasks until they are done.
I like having a simple plan before I jump into my day.
I put off important things until I really have to do them.
I feel more upbeat after spending time with people.
I would rather skip a big social event if I can.
I speak up when I have an opinion.
I like being around people most days.
I need a lot of alone time to recharge.
I try to see the other person's side in a disagreement.
I can be blunt even when it might hurt feelings.
I care about keeping peace in a group.
I trust people until they give me a reason not to.
I argue my point even when others want to move on.
Small worries can stick in my head for a while.
I stay calm when plans change at the last minute.
I get stressed more easily than people around me.
My mood can shift quickly during a hard week.
I bounce back fast after a setback.
